checklist.description: In the service entrypoint, `configureDBOS` is called before `initDBOS`
checklist.name: configureDBOS before initDBOS

checklist.description: `initWorkflows` (or equivalent workflow registration) is called before `initDBOS`
checklist.name: initWorkflows before initDBOS

checklist.description: In the dispatch handler, no DBOS workflow is started (e.g. via `DBOS.startWorkflow`, `wfQueue.enqueue`, or similar) inside a `runTransaction` or transaction callback block
checklist.name: No workflow inside transaction

checklist.description: Workflow dispatches happen after the transaction has committed — the code structure shows the DB write completes first, then workflows are triggered
checklist.name: Workflows after transaction commit

checklist.description: When dispatching multiple workflows or running multiple async operations in parallel inside a DBOS workflow step, `Promise.allSettled()` is used instead of `Promise.all()`
checklist.name: Promise.allSettled in step

checklist.description: `Promise.all()` is NOT used for parallel async operations inside DBOS workflow steps
checklist.name: No Promise.all in DBOS steps

checklist.description: Uses DBOS SDK imports from `@dbos-inc/dbos-sdk` for workflow/step decorators or classes
checklist.name: Correct DBOS imports

checklist.description: Service shutdown calls `DBOS.shutdown()` (or `shutdownDBOS`) when the process terminates
checklist.name: Shutdown order

context: Tests whether the agent correctly initializes DBOS in the right order (configureDBOS → initWorkflows → initDBOS → launchDBOS), avoids starting workflows inside runTransaction, and uses Promise.allSettled instead of Promise.all in DBOS single-step contexts.
